prompt: I have a Rust CLI tool called 'env-vault' that encrypts .env files and manages secrets. It's in a GitHub repo at github.com/user/env-vault. The main binary is in src/main.rs, it has subcommands: 'encrypt', 'decrypt', 'rotate', and 'status'. It uses a config file at ~/.env-vault/config.toml. It can integrate with AWS KMS and GCP KMS for key management. I want to add a marketing website to this project. Can you set it up?

assertions.name: has-monorepo-structure
assertions.description: Output includes packages/ directory with both cli and website subdirectories

assertions.name: has-astro-config
assertions.description: packages/website/astro.config.ts exists and uses Astro with tailwindcss vite plugin

assertions.name: has-global-css-theme
assertions.description: global.css uses Tailwind v4 @theme directive with color tokens (surface, primary, tertiary)

assertions.name: has-layout-astro
assertions.description: packages/website/src/layouts/Layout.astro exists with Google Fonts (Space Grotesk, Inter)

assertions.name: has-hero-section
assertions.description: index.astro has a hero section with the tool name 'env-vault' and an install command in a terminal component

assertions.name: has-features-section
assertions.description: index.astro has features covering encrypt, decrypt, rotate capabilities with Material Symbols icons

assertions.name: has-usage-examples
assertions.description: Usage section shows actual CLI subcommand examples (encrypt, decrypt, rotate, status)

assertions.name: has-config-section
assertions.description: Has a setup/config section showing the config.toml format

assertions.name: has-overhang-pattern
assertions.description: Hero terminal uses negative margin overhang pattern (-mb-16 z-20 or similar)

assertions.name: has-updated-agents-md
assertions.description: Root AGENTS.md mentions the website package and includes website dev/build commands

assertions.name: has-tailwind-v4-setup
assertions.description: No tailwind.config.js file exists; Tailwind is loaded via @tailwindcss/vite plugin and @import 'tailwindcss'

assertions.name: uses-space-grotesk-inter
assertions.description: Uses Space Grotesk for headlines and Inter for body text

assertions.name: website-is-single-page
assertions.description: Only one page file exists in src/pages/ (index.astro) — no routing
